name: Cable Glute Kickback
setup: Facing cable machine, ankle strap on one leg
Grip handles for stability, slight forward lean
execution: Kick working leg straight back, squeezing glute
Go until hip fully extended (don't arch back)
Lower under control without touching floor
common_mistakes: Arching lower back (should be glute only)
cues: Think 'push the floor away behind you'
